title: Pupper Client
description: Pupper Client is a Minecraft client optimized for PVP, providing smoother gameplay and better performance with a modern Material UI design philosophy.
body:
# Pupper Client

A Better, Faster Minecraft Client for PVP

## Features
- Optimized performance and gameplay experience
- Custom HUD and UI elements
- Built-in ViaFabricPlus for multi-version support
- Enhanced rendering and visual effects

## Installation

1. Download the mod
2. Add the mod file into Your Minecraft Launcher

## Requirements
- **Minecraft**
- **Required Mods**:
    - ViaFabricPlus
    - Fabric API
    - ModMenu
